title: Mo' Cookies
body:
> This is my most popular mod, which is cool, but it's also for modern and I _really_ don't like the idea of having to update it alongside Minecraft itself. I think 1.21.5  will have significant changes made to how items are generated as well (something something datagen), which means I'd have to completely rewrite the mod for that (not like this is a very big mod, but I'm lazy). The Github is linked if you want to update it yourself though, I'll accept PRs~

## Intro
This mod adds more cookies. They all have crafting recipes (available in the vanilla crafting book), and act exactly the same as the normal cookie (except for the golden cookie, which gives 16 saturation).

## All Cookies
- Chocolate Chip Cookie (the Minecraft classic)
- Chocolate Cookie
- Golden Cookie (much saturation)
- Sugar Cookie
- Half Moon Cookie
- Stroopwafel Cookie
- Macaron Cookies
  - Chocolate
  - Rosewater
